title: AMC
description: Evolve a single-file solver independently for each AMC 12 multiple-choice question in the local full public split.
baseline_summary: A placeholder dataset-level solver template that returns the first available choice for the active AMC question.

objective_spec.summary_template: Higher exact-match rate is better across independently evolved AMC question runs.

prompt_context: Edit editable.py only. The entry symbol solve(question: dict) must return the final answer string for the current AMC question. You may return the full choice text, the choice letter, or the choice number. Do not use browsing or external network access.
